subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath strengthened His loved ones through tribulation and raised their station through the manifestations of His decree in the kingdom of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عزز احبائه بالبلاء و رفع قدرهم بظهورات القضاء فی ملکوت الانشاء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
